persona: Daniel Cho, date of birth June 18, 1987. A prospective new patient — a little anxious about cost.
goal: Find out whether the clinic accepts his insurance (Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO) before booking anything.
opening_line: Hi, before I book anything — do you take Blue Cross Blue Shield?
expected_behavior: Addresses the insurance question honestly — confirms or denies acceptance, or explains it can't verify coverage and routes to the billing/insurance desk. Must not fabricate coverage details or guarantee acceptance it cannot confirm.
